$comment: Ground-truth labels for the critic calibration cases. A critic run is scored per README.md. Labels were authored with the cases (author-label bias is documented); replace with independent human labels before publishing agreement numbers. Expanded 2026-07-17 from 4 to 12 cases across all three registers (two controls). Still author-labelled.

control-clean.rationale: Shipped flagship. A calibrated critic may file minor P2/P3 polish notes but no blockers; more than 3 findings on the control indicates over-triggering.

mustFind.gist: every entrance is the same centered fade; rhythm is metronomic/monotonous

uniform-monotony.rationale: Deterministic gates pass (durations alternate); the defect is aesthetic uniformity across the film.

mustFind.gist: category-guessable purple-glow AI aesthetic (two-altitude first-order fail)
emoji used as design elements in display copy

slop-aesthetic.rationale: The look is the #1 named tell in MO-SLOP; a critic that shrugs here is not usable.

mustFind.gist: declared hero moment (the chart) is visually subordinate; decorative glow dominates the frame

broken-hierarchy.rationale: Requires reading direction.json and comparing against the render — the intent-match capability specifically.

mustFind.gist: emotional register contradiction: private-wealth gravitas copy in a candy palette with bouncy springs

tone-mismatch.rationale: Every gate passes; the film's feeling contradicts its words. CC-COL-1 (palette is emotion) + CC-NARR-5 (arc is deliberate).

mustFind.gist: olive-lime accent clashes with warm terracotta; decorative gradients dominate — palette harmony failure despite legal contrast

color-soup.rationale: WCAG passes everywhere; harmony is not measurable by contrast ratio. CC-COL-1/2.

mustFind.gist: the close is crammed (logo + tag + CTA in one short beat) — the film ends without air

rushed-close.rationale: Sits just above the CC-RHY-4 duration gate; the felt problem is density, not length alone.

mustFind.gist: every scene is a dead-centered poster; no compositional variety or negative-space intent

dead-center-parade.rationale: MO-EDIT-3 passes via palette/scale axes; the eye still sees a centered parade. CC-CAM-3/CC-COMP-3.

mustFind.gist: entrances reverse screen direction every beat with no narrative reason — whiplash continuity

social-whiplash.rationale: MO-CHOR-4 is draft/ungated; only a critic can call directional chaos.

control-premium.rationale: Second control, product-demo register. Guards against over-triggering outside brand-film.

mustFind.gist: ambient glows dominate while content is dim and small — screensaver, not a product film

wallpaper-drift.rationale: Brightness spent on decoration, starved on the hero — CC-COL-3 inverted; CC-NARR-3.

mustFind.gist: three competing badge captions in every scene — no visual rest, nothing leads the eye

caption-carpet.rationale: All positions/sizes legal; the failure is density and divided attention. CC-COMP-3, CC-TYPE-4.

scoring.findingHit: a finding whose dimension matches and whose observation covers the gist (semantic match, judged by the scorer)
scoring.falsePositive: any P1 finding on control-clean, or any finding contradicting a mustNotFind
scoring.report: verdict matches x/4 · mustFind hits y/4 · false positives z — record per run in runs/
